summary: Strong test suite with comprehensive core functionality and excellent workflow validation. Covers classification, formatting, CLI integration, and GitHub Actions execution via act. Main gaps: missing boundary condition testing (e.g., secrets expiring exactly at warning threshold), invalid JSON error path, environment variable (FAKE_NOW), help flag, and edge cases like empty arrays or extreme policy days. Tests are well-organized, use deterministic fixtures with REFERENCE_NOW, validate exit codes and output content accurately, and include real end-to-end testing through three fixture cases run via act. Would catch most regressions in main paths and workflow structure, but some subtle bugs in edge cases might slip through.
